artifact_summary: Network diagram for City of Tampa Wastewater Department treatment plant showing PLC, SCADA, and media converter connections.
artifact_blurb: A detailed network topology schematic for the City of Tampa Wastewater Department's treatment facility, mapping physical cabling and logical connections between Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) terminals, and media converters distributed across the Sludge Treatment, Standby Power, and Oxygen Generation buildings.
replacement_text: A detailed network topology schematic for the City of Tampa Wastewater Department's treatment facility, mapping physical cabling and logical connections between Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition (SCADA) terminals, and media converters distributed across the Sludge Treatment, Standby Power, and Oxygen Generation buildings.
